home.hero_title: The association of Cameroonian students in China
home.hero_subtitle: A network of support, memory and opportunities since 1997
home.mission_support_copy: Help Cameroonian students settle, get informed and support each other.
home.mission_memory_copy: Pass on AECC history and the work of the generations who built the network.
home.mission_opportunities_copy: Publish useful information about scholarships, jobs, applications and events.

publier.success_msg: Thank you! Your announcement was submitted successfully and will appear here after review.

opportunites.title: Scholarships, jobs & opportunities
opportunites.subtitle: Selected and published by the AECC team for the community

histoire.label: Origins & History
histoire.title: 25 years of history
histoire.subtitle: From the informal student network of 1997 to a structured international association
histoire.fondateurs_subtitle: Official list of the 17 founding members
histoire.first_board_issa_description: First representative of the Cameroonian students' network in China, she laid the groundwork for what would become AECC at the founding General Assembly in 1999 in Beijing.
histoire.first_board_solange_description: Elected president during AECC's 25th anniversary in 2022, she embodies the association's continuity and international reach, with 19 presidents spread across every continent.

about.title: About AECC
about.subtitle: An association serving the Cameroonian student community in China.
about.body_1: AECC supports Cameroonian students in China through mutual help, information sharing and community representation.
about.body_2: The website brings together the association's history, useful announcements and opportunities shared by the team.

admin.login_subtitle: Sign in to manage website content

admin.accounts_subtitle: Create admin and super admin accounts, adjust their role and temporarily disable access without adding a dedicated table.
admin.account_create_subtitle: Roles are stored in Supabase Auth via user_metadata.role.
